accountTypes.businessOwnerDescription: Create a workspace for your workshop, detailing center, tire shop, or service team.

notFound.title: We couldn't find that page
notFound.description: The page may have moved, or the link is no longer valid. Let's get you back on track.

error.title: That didn't work as expected
error.description: An unexpected error occurred. You can try again, or head back to safety. If it keeps happening, please let the team know.

globalError.title: The app ran into a problem
globalError.description: Something went wrong while loading Revora. Reloading usually fixes it.

portalHome.title: Portal
portalHome.description: Your linked accounts and complaint history.
